title: AdminOP
description: Enhanced operator system with admin levels, customization and special features
body:
AdminOP: Enhanced Server Administration System AdminOP transforms Minecraft server management by replacing the traditional /op command with a comprehensive administrative toolkit that offers tiered access control, persistent settings, and unique features designed for server owners. Key Features Multi-Level Admin System Four distinct admin levels: Junior, Standard, Senior, and Owner Each level can have customized permissions and capabilities Perfect for servers with multiple staff members requiring different access levels Command Replacements /admin [level] - Grant administrative access with optional level specification /unadmin - Remove administrative privileges /adminlist - Display all administrators with their levels and online status /adminreload - Reload configuration settings without server restart /adminseed - Get curated Minecraft world seeds for new worlds Persistence & Security Admin settings remain between server restarts Configurable broadcast messages for transparency Permissions integration with major permission plugins Visual & Experience Enhancements Visual effects when granting admin status (configurable lightning strike) Fully customizable messages with color code support Distinctive prefix for all plugin messages Seed Collection Built-in library of exceptional Minecraft seeds Seeds include descriptions of key features and coordinates Easily expandable through configuration Full Customization Every message can be customized in the config.yml Enable/disable features based on server needs Extensive permission nodes for granular control Why Choose AdminOP? Server owners choose AdminOP for its perfect balance of simplicity and depth. Unlike basic operator systems, this powerful plugins provides clear administrative hierarchies while maintaining an intuitive command structure that's easy for staff to learn. The persistence feature ensures your administrative setup remains intact through server restarts, eliminating the frustration of reconfiguring operators after unexpected shutdowns. This is especially valuable for larger servers with multiple administrators. The seed collection feature adds unique value beyond admin management, giving server owners quick access to exceptional world seeds when creating new worlds or resetting existing ones. AdminOP was designed with scalability in mind, from small friend groups to large community servers, allowing your administrative structure to grow alongside your server community. Technical Highlights Lightweight with minimal performance impact Compatible with Minecraft 1.20+ (API version support) No dependencies required ( Maybe luckpemrs to add perms to diffrent like admin ranks ) Permission plugin integration ready Intuitive configuration file with extensive documentation Transform your server's administrative experience today with AdminOP - the complete operator replacement solution for thoughtful server owners.
